title: Best Adapted Screenplay Predictions
text: Nominees: Bugonia, Frankenstein, Hamnet, One Battle After Another, Train Dreams. Will and should win: One Battle After Another. According to the article, major precursor awards for screenplays have predominantly gone to either Sinners or One Battle, suggesting these films are frontrunners in their respective categories. The prediction indicates One Battle After Another is expected to secure this award, with the article noting that such dominant performances across award bodies typically translate to Oscar success.
